You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

},\\n        dependencies: { type: 'array' }\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n)\\n\\nlog(`CodeGraph 扫描完成: ${graphStatus.stats?.nodes || 0} 节点, ${graphStatus.stats?.edges || 0} 边`)\\n\\n// ========== 阶段1: 核心模块: ${graphStatus.modules?.map(m => m.name).join(', ') || '未知'}\\n- 关键文件: ${graphStatus.coreFiles?.join(', ') || '未知'}\\n\\n请扫描项目结构，识别：\\n1. 项目名称、主要语言、文件数量\\n2. 构建系统（CMake/Maven/npm/Gradle等）\\n3. 第三方依赖列表\\n4. 关键入口点\\n5. 目录结构和模块划分\\n`\\n\\nconst enhancedArchPrompt = `\\n基于 CodeGraph 依赖图，模块依赖关系如下：\\n${JSON.stringify(graphStatus.dependencies || [], null, 2)}\\n\\n请深度分析代码架构：\\n1. 逻辑分层（UI层/业务层/数据层等）\\n2. 模块间依赖关系和调用链\\n3. 设计模式识别（单例/工厂/观察者等）\\n4. 组件依赖图和数据流向\\n5. 核心类和方法的关系\\n`\\n\\n// 并行执行：3个 understand-anything agents + 1个 CodeGraph 调用链分析\\nconst [scanResult, archResult, domainResult, callGraphAnalysis] = await parallel([\\n  () => agent(enhancedScanPrompt, {\\n    agentType: 'understand-anything:project-scanner',\\n    label: 'project-scanner',\\n    phase: '并行分析'\\n  }),\\n  () => agent(enhancedArchPrompt, {\\n    agentType: 'understand-anything:architecture-analyzer',\\n    label: 'architecture-analyzer',\\n    phase: '并行分析'\\n  }),\\n  () => agent(\\n    `提取业务领域知识：\\n     - 核心业务领域和子领域划分\\n     - 关键业务概念和术语\\n     - 业务流程和操作步骤\\n     - 领域模型（实体/值对象/聚合）\\n     - 业务规则和约束条件`,\\n    {\\n      agentType: 'understand-anything:domain-analyzer',\\n      label: 识别跨模块调用\\n\\n    2. 对关键函数执行 codegraph_impact\\n       - 计算变更影响范围\\n       - 识别关键路径\\n\\n    3. 使用 find_similar_code 发现重复代码模式\\n\\n    4. 使用 dead-code 检测识别无用代码\\n\\n    输出：\\n    {\\n      callChains: [{ function, callers: [], callees: [], depth }],\\n      impactedFunctions: [...],\\n      similarCodeGroups: [...],\\n      deadCodeFiles: [...]\\n    }`,\\n    {\\n      label: ==========\\nconst criticalFiles = extractCriticalFiles(scanResult, archResult, graphStatus)\\nlog(`识别到 ${criticalFiles.length} 个核心文件待分析`)\\n\\n// ========== 阶段2: 文件分析（增强版） ==========\\nphase('文件分析')\\n\\n// 先用 CodeGraph 获取文件结构，再用 understand-anything 深度分析\\nconst fileAnalyses = await pipeline(\\n  criticalFiles,\\n  async (file, index) => {\\n    // 先用 CodeGraph 快速获取符号结构\\n    const fileStructure = await agent(\\n      `使用 CodeGraph 工具分析: ${file}\\n\\n      1. codegraph_node 获取文件的符号定义\\n         - 类结构、成员变量、方法签名\\n\\n      2. codegraph_callers/callees 分析调用关系\\n         - 谁调用了这个文件中的函数\\n         - 这个文件中的函数调用了什么\\n\\n      然后使用 file-analyzer 进行深度分析，结合 CodeGraph 数据：\\n      - 提取类结构、成员变量、方法签名\\n      - 关键算法和业务逻辑\\n      - 数据结构设计\\n      - 代码注释中的设计决策\\n      - 依赖的外部模块`,\\n      {\\n        agentType: 'understand-anything:file-analyzer',\\n        label: `file-analyzer:${file.split('/').pop()}`,\\n        phase: '文件分析'\\n      }\\n    )\\n    return fileStructure\\n  },\\n  { concurrency: 5 }\\n)\\n\\nlog(`文件分析完成：${fileAnalyses.length} 个文件深度分析`)\\n\\n// ========== 阶段3: 学习路径生成 ==========\\nphase('学习路径')\\n\\nconst tourResult = await agent(\\n  `基于以下分析结果生成结构化学习路径：\\n\\n  项目扫描: ${scanResult.summary || '已扫描'}\\n  架构分析: ${archResult.summary || '已分析'}\\n  领域知识: ${domainResult.summary || '已提取'}\\n  CodeGraph 调用链: ${callGraphAnalysis.callChains?.length || 0} 条调用链\\n  核心文件: ${fileAnalyses.map(f => f.fileName).join(', ')}\\n\\n  要求：\\n  - 生成 8-15 个学习步骤\\n  - 每步包含主题、目标、关键文件\\n  - 推荐阅读顺序\\n  - 标注重点和难点\\n  - 融入调用链分析结果（哪些是核心函数，调用深度如何）`,\\n  {\\n    agentType: 'understand-anything:tour-builder',\\n    label: 'tour-builder',\\n    phase: '学习路径'\\n  }\\n)\\n\\nlog(`学习路径生成完成：${tourResult.steps?.length || 0} 个学习步骤`)\\n\\n// ========== 阶段4: 知识图谱审查 ==========\\nphase('图谱审查')\\n\\nconst reviewResult = await agent(\\n  `审查验证知识图谱的完整性和一致性：\\n   - 检查节点是否完整（项目/模块/类/函数）\\n   - 检查边是否正确（依赖/调用/继承关系）\\n   - 结合 CodeGraph 的调用链数据进行验证\\n   - 识别可能缺失的连接\\n   - 验证数据流向的准确性\\n   - 提出修复建议`,\\n  {\\n    agentType: 'understand-anything:graph-reviewer',\\n    label: 'graph-reviewer',\\n    phase: '图谱审查'\\n  }\\n)\\n\\nlog(`知识图谱审查完成`)\\n\\n// ========== 阶段5: 知识沉淀（整合 CodeGraph 数据） ==========\\nphase('知识沉淀')\\n\\nconst knowledgeTopics = detectKnowledgeTopicsWithCodeGraph(\\n  scanResult, archResult, domainResult, fileAnalyses, callGraphAnalysis, graphStatus\\n)\\nlog(`检测到 ${knowledgeTopics.length} 个知识主题待沉淀`)\\n\\n// 使用 parallel 并行创建多个知识文档\\nconst knowledgeDocs = await parallel(\\n  knowledgeTopics.map(topic => () => agent(\\n    `创建知识文档：docs/exploration/${topic.filename}\\n\\n     主题：${topic.title}\\n     内容要求：\\n     - 问题背景\\n     - 核心流程\\n     - 实现细节（含 CodeGraph 调用链数据）\\n     - 应用场景\\n     - 总结\\n\\n     参考信息：\\n     ${topic.content}\\n\\n     CodeGraph 增强数据：\\n     ${topic.codegraphData ? label: `create:${topic.filename}`, phase: '知识沉淀' }\\n  ))\\n)\\n\\nlog(`知识沉淀完成：${knowledgeDocs.length} 个文档创建`)\\n\\n// ========== 阶段6: 更新索引和系统状态 ==========\\nawait agent(\\n  `执行以下操作完成知识库初始化：\\n   1. { label: 'finalize', phase: '完成' }\\n)\\n\\nlog(`知识库初始化完成！`)\\nreturn {\\n  scan: scanResult,\\n  arch: archResult,\\n  domain: domainResult,\\n  codegraph: callGraphAnalysis,\\n  files: fileAnalyses,\\n  tour: tourResult,\\n  review: reviewResult,\\n  knowledgeDocs: knowledgeDocs.length\\n}\\n\\n// ========== 辅助函数 ==========\\n\\n/**\\n * 从扫描结果、架构分析和 CodeGraph 数据中提取核心文件\\n */\\nfunction extractCriticalFiles(scanResult, archResult, graphStatus) {\\n  const files = new Set()\\n\\n  // 从 CodeGraph project_map 获取核心文件\\n  if (graphStatus.coreFiles) {\\n    graphStatus.coreFiles.forEach(f => files.add(f))\\n  }\\n\\n  // 从 project-scanner 结果中提取关键文件\\n  if (scanResult.entryPoints) {\\n    scanResult.entryPoints.forEach(ep => files.add(ep))\\n  }\\n  if (scanResult.keyFiles) {\\n    scanResult.keyFiles.forEach(f => files.add(f))\\n  }\\n\\n  // 从 architecture-analyzer 结果中提取核心模块文件\\n  if (archResult.coreModules) {\\n    archResult.coreModules.forEach(m => {\\n      if (m.files) m.files.forEach(f => files.add(f))\\n    })\\n  }\\n  if (archResult.keyClasses) {\\n    archResult.keyClasses.forEach(c => {\\n      if (c.file) files.add(c.file)\\n    })\\n  }\\n\\n  return Array.from(files).slice(0, 20)\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 检测需要沉淀的知识主题（整合 CodeGraph 数据）\\n */\\nfunction detectKnowledgeTopicsWithCodeGraph(scanResult, content: `项目名称: ${scanResult.projectName || '未知'}\\n     主要语言: ${scanResult.languages?.join(', ') || '未知'}\\n     构建系统: ${scanResult.buildSystem || '未知'}\\n     文件数量: ${scanResult.fileCount || '未知'}`,\\n    codegraphData: graphStatus.stats\\n  })\\n\\n  // 2. 架构分析\\n  if (archResult.layers) {\\n    topics.push({\\n      filename: '02-architecture-analysis.md',\\n      title: '架构分析',\\n      content: `分层结构: ${JSON.stringify(archResult.layers)}\\n     设计模式: ${archResult.designPatterns?.join(', ') || '未识别'}\\n     模块依赖: ${JSON.stringify(archResult.dependencies)}`,\\n      codegraphData: {\\n        dependencies: graphStatus.dependencies,\\n        modules: graphStatus.modules\\n      }\\n    })\\n  }\\n\\n  // 3. 调用链分析（新增强）\\n  if (callGraphAnalysis.callChains?.length > 0) {\\n    topics.push({\\n      filename: '03-call-chain-analysis.md',\\n      title: '调用链分析',\\n      content: `核心调用链数量: ${callGraphAnalysis.callChains.length}\\n     关键函数: ${callGraphAnalysis.callChains.filter(c => c.depth > 2).map(c => c.function).join(', ') || '未识别'}\\n     跨模块调用: ${callGraphAnalysis.callChains.filter(c => c.crossModule).length || 0}`,\\n      codegraphData: callGraphAnalysis.callChains\\n    })\\n  }\\n\\n  // 4. 领域知识\\n  if (domainResult.domains) {\\n    topics.push({\\n      filename: '04-domain-knowledge.md',\\n      title: '领域知识',\\n      content: `业务领域: ${domainResult.domains.join(', ')}\\n     核心概念: ${domainResult.coreConcepts?.join(', ') || '未提取'}\\n     业务流程: ${JSON.stringify(domainResult.processes)}`\\n    })\\n  }\\n\\n  // 5. 核心文件分析（取前3个最重要的）\\n  const topFiles = fileAnalyses.slice(0, 3)\\n  topFiles.forEach((analysis, idx) => {\\n    // 从 callGraphAnalysis 查找该文件的调用链\\n    const fileCallChain = callGraphAnalysis.callChains?.find(c =>\\n      analysis.fileName && c.function.includes(analysis.fileName.split('/').pop())\\n    )\\n    topics.push({\\n      filename: `0${idx + 5}-file-${analysis.fileName.split('/').pop().replace('.', '-')}.md`,\\n      title: `核心文件分析: ${analysis.fileName}`,\\n      content: `文件: ${analysis.fileName}\\n     类结构: ${JSON.stringify(analysis.classes)}\\n     关键方法: ${analysis.keyMethods?.join(', ') || '未识别'}\\n     设计决策: ${analysis.designDecisions?.join('; ') || '无'}`,\\n      codegraphData: fileCallChain ? { callChain: fileCallChain } : null\\n    })\\n  })\\n\\n  // 6. 学习路径\\n  if (tourResult?.steps) {\\n    topics.push({\\n      filename: '06-learning-path.md',\\n      title: '学习路径',\\n      content: `学习步骤: ${JSON.stringify(tourResult.steps)}\\n     推荐顺序: ${tourResult.recommendedOrder?.join(' → ') || '未推荐'}\\n     重点难点: ${tourResult.keyPoints?.join(', ') || '未标注'}`\\n    })\\n  }\\n\\n  // 7. 相似代码和死代码检测（新增强）\\n  if (callGraphAnalysis.similarCodeGroups?.length > 0 || callGraphAnalysis.deadCodeFiles?.length > 0) {\\n    topics.push({\\n      filename: '07-code-quality-analysis.md',\\n      title: '代码质量分析',\\n      content: `相似代码组: ${callGraphAnalysis.similarCodeGroups?.length || 0}\\n     死代码文件: ${callGraphAnalysis.deadCodeFiles?.join(', ') || '无'}`,\\n      codegraphData: {\\n        similarCode: callGraphAnalysis.similarCodeGroups,\\n        deadCode: callGraphAnalysis.deadCodeFiles\\n      }\\n    })\\n  }\\n\\n  return topics\\n}\"}"</parameters>

- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch
